title: Senior Instructional Designer at Udemy India

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Udemy India
jsonLd.description:
Udemy India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Udemy India:
Udemy India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India!
